name: UL 508A Certified Control Panels
shortDesc: Custom designed, certified industrial control panels fabricated in our state-of-the-art UL 508A shop.

faq.a: UL 508A is the industrial safety standard for industrial control panels. It ensures electrical safety, proper component integration, and compliance with the National Electrical Code (NEC).

faq.q: Do you perform custom modifications on enclosures?
faq.a: Yes, we custom mill and punch steel, stainless steel, and non-metallic enclosures using automated CNC equipment for perfect seal integrity.

name: Safety Instrumented Systems (SIS)
shortDesc: Functional safety engineering, SIL calculations, and safety PLC panel design protecting high-risk processes.

faq.q: What is the difference between BPCS and SIS?
faq.a: The Basic Process Control System (BPCS) manages daily plant controls, while the Safety Instrumented Systems (SIS) operates as an independent protection layer to shut down processes during critical excursions.

faq.q: What SIL standards do you comply with?
faq.a: Our engineers design safety systems in strict compliance with IEC 61508, IEC 61511, and ISA 84 standards.

name: Custom PLC & PAC Programming
shortDesc: Robust safety PLC and PAC programming for Rockwell, Siemens, and Schneider controller architectures.

faq.q: Which PLC manufacturers do you support?
faq.a: We are fully certified in Rockwell Automation/Allen-Bradley, Siemens S7, Schneider Electric Modicon, and Honeywell Safety Manager.

faq.q: Do you provide original source code to the client?
faq.a: Yes, upon project completion and final payment, the fully commented source files and CAD drawings are transferred directly to you.

name: HMI & SCADA System Integration
shortDesc: High-performance HMI design, SCADA networking, and plant-wide industrial telemetry architectures.

faq.q: What SCADA platforms do you specialize in?
faq.a: We specialize in Inductive Automation Ignition, GE iFIX, AVEVA System Platform/Wonderware, and Rockwell FactoryTalk View.

faq.q: Do you support cloud SCADA integration?
faq.a: Yes, we implement secure MQTT Sparkplug B gateways to route telemetry data securely to AWS, Azure, or private cloud databases.

name: Commissioning & 24/7 Field Troubleshooting
shortDesc: On-site Factory Acceptance Testing (FAT), loop checks, start-up commissioning, and critical emergency response.

faq.q: Do you offer emergency after-hours support?
faq.a: Yes, we maintain a dedicated team of emergency field engineers on call 24/7/365 to handle critical plant shutdown diagnostic services.

faq.q: What is included in your Factory Acceptance Testing (FAT)?
faq.a: Our standard FAT includes full I/O loop checks, functional safety trip validation, communication verification, and high-voltage insulation checks.
